summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PaisaPe V4 new features. 19/19 backend tests passed. Frontend pages load correctly except Live Transactions has data display issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Page shows 'No transactions found' even though API /api/recharge/all returns data. Console shows HTML structure errors: '<span> cannot be a child of <tbody>'. Stats cards also show 0 values.

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix Live Transactions page - data not rendering despite API returning correct data. Check React component rendering in LiveTransactions.js around lines 172-198 for HTML structure issues (span inside tbody)
critical_code_review_comments: All backend endpoints for KYC, Disputes, Reconciliation, 2FA, Pending Report, Bulk Resolve, Change Status, Webhook are working correctly
Admin sidebar has all 16 navigation items including new features
Pending Report Detail dialog correctly shows API request/response and retry API selector
KYC Submit page works for retailers
2FA Settings page works for retailers and admin
HTML structure issue in LiveTransactions.js causing data not to render

success_rate.frontend: 92% - All pages load except Live Transactions data display

seed_data_creation: Existing sandbox transactions used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend V4 features all working. KYC endpoints, Dispute endpoints, Reconciliation endpoints, 2FA endpoints, Pending Report with Bulk Resolve, Admin status change, Transaction detail, Webhook callback all tested and passing. Frontend issue: LiveTransactions.js has HTML structure bug preventing data display. Use test file test_paisape_v4_features.py for regression.

tested_features.admin_sidebar_16_nav_items: PASSED - All new nav items present
tested_features.pending_report_page: PASSED - Bulk Resolve button, Detail dialog with API req/resp
tested_features.kyc_management_page: PASSED - Tabs for pending/all, verify dialog
tested_features.reseller_api_page: PASSED - API Users tab, API Docs tab
tested_features.reconciliation_page: PASSED - Stats cards, Run Now button
tested_features.live_transactions_page: FAILED - Data not rendering despite API working
tested_features.retailer_kyc_submit: PASSED - Form with doc type, number, submit button

mocked_apis.note: Sandbox mode uses mock random responses. WebSocket is real gateway but no external provider callbacks in test.
mocked_apis_list: WebSocket notifications (real gateway, no external events in test)

rca_of_the_issue: LiveTransactions.js has HTML structure issues where React is rendering <span> elements inside <tbody> which is invalid HTML. This causes the browser to fail rendering the transaction rows. The fetchData() function correctly calls api.recharge.getAll() which returns data (verified via curl), but the React component fails to render due to HTML structure violations.
